title: Response types use String for JMAP IDs — Id newtype exists but is not applied
description: GetResponse.account_id/not_found, QueryResponse.ids, ChangesResponse.created/updated/destroyed, SetResponse.destroyed, QueryChangesResponse.removed, AddedItem.id, SpaceJoinResponse.space_id — all use String where the Id newtype (jmap.rs) should be used. Id guarantees non-empty (RFC 8620 §1.2), has Display/AsRef/Deref/PartialEq<str>. Attachment.blob_id and Span.user_id already use Id correctly. The inconsistency means callers get Id from some server-assigned fields and String from others with no API-level reason, and bugs where a server sends an empty ID string will silently propagate instead of returning a parse error. This is the most important before the API fossilizes.
